metadata.description: Ponder — drive your real Chrome browser via MCP. A skill + 15 tools that let any agent open pages, click, type, fill forms, post listings, scrape content, and automate any web flow.

plugins.name: ponder
plugins.description: Browser automation skill + MCP server (Playwriter + cliclick). Activates on any web task; covers the full TYPE → CLICK SUGGESTION → CLICK APPLY flow plus mouse/keyboard recovery.
